message:
feat(render): add bump-allocated frame arena and program runtime extensions

Add bumpalo dependency and new arena.rs module to ftui-render for
bump-allocated frame rendering, reducing per-frame allocation overhead.
Add frame.rs module with frame buffer abstraction for compositing
render passes. Export new modules from lib.rs.

Extend ftui-runtime program.rs with additional runtime lifecycle hooks
for frame management integration.

Sync beads issue tracker metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -23,6 +23,7 @@ memchr = "2.7.6"
 smallvec = "1.15.1"
 unicode-segmentation = "1.12.0"
 web-time = "1.1.0"
+bumpalo = "3.19.1"
 ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.1.1" }
 tracing = { version = "0.1.41", optional = true }
 # Note: ftui-render is the core kernel and should not depend on ftui-style.
